perks.summary: load a TDC dataset (single_pred/multi_pred/generation) and write a train/valid/test split via the chosen method (scaffold/random/cold_drug/cold_target)
score predictions against ground truth with a standardized TDC metric (ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, RMSE, MAE, R2, Spearman, Pearson, ...)
run a TDC benchmark group's evaluate protocol (5-seed) over a predictions file and report per-dataset mean +/- std
score a list of SMILES with a TDC molecular oracle (QED, SA, LogP, GSK3B, DRD2, JNK3, ...) for molecular optimization
